channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Obama Stumps for Texas Democrats in Austin
item.description: Former President Barack Obama made a surprise stop at an Austin taco shop Tuesday to support Texas Democrats James Talarico and Gina Hinojosa ahead of...

item.title: Dallas mayor blasts NYC for ‘punishing success' as he pitches ‘Y’all Street’ to fleeing billionaires
item.description: Dallas Mayor Eric Johnson touts "Y'all Street" as a rising rival to Wall Street, blasting NYC Mayor Mamdani for what he calls punishing success.

item.title: In Nashville, Capitol Tantrums Come With a Bill — and Tennessee Dems Just Received It
Trump Names ICE Veteran David Venturella Acting Director
item.description: The Trump administration has named longtime immigration official David Venturella acting director of U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement amid a p...
